ksa_text: Evaluate and select ML platform tooling, producing architectural decision records with documented rationale and re-evaluation criteria.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of Extensible Markup Language (XML) schemas

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.
Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.
Knowledge of Extensible Markup Language (XML) schemas

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-013 (AI, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4312 is insufficient to establish relevance to health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.431, ddat=0.422, dcwf=0.409) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4312 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-T-013 (composite 0.4312) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4312 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Health Informatics Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4312 is not a standard requirement for Health Informatics Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4312, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
